documentation.file_docstring: Default instructions injected into every safeguard-mode compaction summary. Preserves conversation language and persona while keeping the SDK's required summary structure intact.
inline_comments: Upper bound on custom instruction length to prevent prompt bloat. ~800 chars ≈ ~200 tokens — keeps summarization quality stable.

Resolve compaction instructions with precedence: event (SDK) → runtime (config) → DEFAULT constant. Each input is normalized first (trim + empty→undefined) so that blank strings don't short-circuit the fallback chain.
Compose split-turn instructions by combining the SDK's turn-prefix instructions with the resolved compaction instructions.
